data.title: 国际服BETA测感谢信
data.summary: Sensei, someone sent you a congratulatory letter! I get the sense that whoever sent it has a strong.
data.body:
Sensei, someone sent you a congratulatory letter!
I get the sense that whoever sent it has a strong...will, maybe? Like they're really tenacious. 
I'm not sure who they are, but you should read it!
#BlueArchive
